mnemonics: T.I.M.E. Series: Trend, Irregularity, Moving Average, EDA
keyPoints: Always visualize the time series data first to identify trends and seasonality.
Decompose the series into its core components: trend, seasonality, and residuals.
Check for stationarity, as many time series models require the data to be stationary.
commonMistakes: Ignoring seasonality and mistaking it for a trend.
Applying models without checking for stationarity first.
Using the entire dataset for both training and testing, leading to overfitting and inaccurate future forecasts.
